verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For whatever it takes, I'll keep pressing on Whatever trials come my way, I'll keep pressing further For what shall separate me from the love of Christ Jesus, my Lord I've counted the cost, I'll pickup my cross and keep pressing on

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For whatever it takes, I'll keep pressing on Whatever trials come my way, I'll keep pressing further For what shall separate me from the love of Christ Jesus, my Lord I've counted the cost, I'll pickup my cross and keep pressing on I'll finish my course with joy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As my forefathers did and their fathers before them They kept the Word of God deep in their hearts Through toils and tears they fought with conviction in their souls That their children could have an inheritance The faith of the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For whatever it takes, I'll keep pressing on Whatever satan throws my way, I'll keep pressing further For what shall separate me from the love of Christ Jesus, my Lord I've counted the cost, I'll pickup my cross and keep pressing on I'll finish my course with joy

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Like my sister, Ruth, It is within my makeup to fulfill the task the first Adam did not fulfill For such a time as this, I must come unto perfection And be perseverant inspite of all other obstacles

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: For whatever it takes, I'll keep pressing on Whaterever trials come my way, I'll keep pressing further For what shall separate me from the love of Christ Jesus, my Lord I've counted the cost, I'll pickup my cross and keep pressing on I'll finish my course with joy

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Like my sister, Ruth, It is within my makeup to fulfill the task the first Adam did not fulfill For such a time as this, I must bring forth this Christ child And be perseverant inspite of all other obstacles

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: For whatever it takes, I'll keep pressing on Whaterever trials come my way, I'll keep pressing further For what shall separate me from the love of Christ Jesus, my Lord I've counted the cost, I'll pickup my cross and keep pressing on I'll finish my course with joy
